fresh_price_complete_period.reason: registered instruments contain listing or price-availability gaps

warnings: Experimental validation only; V1 remains formal.
Listing date is used as B1 investable start and does not prove liquidity readiness.
No orders, shares, quantities, amounts, or target prices are produced.

comparison_to_v1.interpretation: Metric differences are descriptive and do not establish V2 superiority.

calendar_deletion_contribution.interpretation: difference between exact-shared and master-aligned analytical views

late_etf_effect.reason: B1 has no isolated counterfactual simulator for late-ETF returns

timing_policy_contribution.reason: same-day counterfactual is intentionally not generated

unexplained_residual.reason: component return counterfactuals are not part of B1
